typography.header_font_style: Geometric Sans-Serif / Medium to Bold weight
text_effects: Significant use of a refined Serif for continuous text blocks
Selective thick underlining on Sans-Serif headings
Rational leading and tracking across all text styles

geometry: Precise, clean geometric primitives (perfect triangles, circles, polygons)
Strict node-link network diagrams with clean connections
Large-radius rounded rectangles as container cards
textures: Perfectly smooth vector gradients and fills
Absence of manual stroke or grain effects

compositional_rules.spacing: Extreme negative space to emphasize logical clarity and structural order
compositional_rules.depth: Flat 2D aesthetic using tonal layering for content cards
compositional_rules.hierarchy: Visual tension and order created by juxtaposing Bold Sans-Serif with Elegant Serif
compositional_rules.alignment: Strict adherence to flush-left grids for narrative, with centered, balanced graphic blocks
